address: 25 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10003, USA

sources_checked.limitation: Content is sparse (6 items only) and contains an apparent data error (an item priced '100.00 JPY' on a US menu), consistent with a low-quality auto-generated/SEO placeholder site rather than a genuine, complete restaurant-maintained menu page. Its alias domain mykenkanyc.com redirects to the same content.
Page states 'Our menu is under update' (no menu content) and is explicitly labeled 'unofficial site' in its own footer.
Yelp's own page disclaimer: 'Menu may not be up to date.' Used as last-resort source per sourcing tiers since no usable official or ordering-platform menu could be found for this location.

manual_review_reason: Menu sourced from Yelp (tier 3, last resort) rather than an official or ordering source, and Yelp itself warns the listing may be outdated. Recommend re-checking official channels (phone, in-person, or a working delivery-platform listing) to confirm current dishes and prices.
